title: satureja calamintha subsp. menthifolia
intro: Satureja calamintha subsp. menthifolia, commonly known as mountain calamintha or mountain savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja calamintha subsp. menthifolia include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Satureja calamintha subsp. menthifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils for topical application.
